rationale.R1.1: The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed well-supported reframing, demonstrating a strong grasp of the underlying concepts.
rationale.R1.4: The agent flagged novelty claims but didn't fully map against prior works, warranting a moderate score.
rationale.R1.7: Thoroughly audited citations and flagged missing works with precision.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly disclosed uncertainties for each recommendation with supporting reasons.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: Avoided harmful content and identified potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Provided detailed annotations but missed linking some minor edits to sources.
